arts.ttl: Manchester United youngster wants more than €4.5m after tax to leave – Red Devils being flexible on fee
arts.sum: Over the past couple of days, talk around Alejandro Garnacho’s future at Manchester United has calmed down considerably. However, speculation has now grown in Italy again. Chelsea were mentioned as a keen candidate to land the Argentine but now Napoli are back in the race for the player. arts.ttl: Ajax can repay Man Utd for Ten Hag and Antony with THIS transfer
arts.sum: Ajax can repay Man Utd for Ten Hag and Antony with THIS transfer Now the Johan Cruyff Arena club may just start to repay the favour, though, by completing a move that could unlock another problem player for Amorim: Marcus Rashford .

Ruben Amorim’s team remain unbeaten in Europe this season and will confirm their passage to the Round of 16 with a win this evening. arts.ttl: 'Trying to force him out' – Gary Neville makes Man Utd claim about Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's time at Manchester United is still uncertain, but Gary Neville is convinced that Ruben Amorim is trying to push the forward out of the club

arts.ttl: FCSB vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Romania to face FCSB for their final Europa League league phase game. A point for the Red Devils tonight should be enough to see them automatically progress into the knockout stages of the competition. arts.ttl: Europa League final day - who is through and what's at stake?
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham and Rangers all have something at stake on what promises to be a thrilling final day of the Europa League league phase.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Christopher Nkunku hope after ‘NO CHANCE’ message
arts.sum: Man Utd have looked a strong option for Nkunku, but they have been told the only way they could sign the versatile attacker permanently would be to strike a deal with Chelsea for Alejandro Garnacho. “Manchester United have looked into the possibility of a deal for Christopher Nkunku, but there would only be a loan,” Sky Sports News transfer expert Dharmesh Sheth reported.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes desperate plea to Marcus Rashford over Man Utd exile
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim pleads with Marcus Rashford to raise his standards and help Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney reveals private Marcus Rashford talks amid 'embarrassing' Man Utd plight
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford continues to be exiled by Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim, with former United skipper Wayne Rooney claiming the forward must leave to salvage his career

arts.ttl: Man Utd Europa League permutations with several outcomes possible on final day
arts.sum: Manchester United face FCSB in Bucharest on Thursday in their final game of the first phase of the Europa League, with their final position in the table yet to be decided
